prerequisites.value: Ability to cast divine spells, summon familiar class ability, caster level 4th, Charisma 13.

description.value: **Benefit:** You gain the channel energy class feature, as a cleric, usable 2 times per day. This ability otherwise functions like the cleric’s channel energy ability, except that your effective cleric level is equal to your divine spellcasting class level â3. Unlike a cleric, however, the number of times per day you may channel energy is not affected by your Charisma modifier.
